Lessons > 26. Project 2 Preview (Zoom Lecture)

Today we will be going over the Project 2 scope and looking at some examples. The class is virtual. Zoom link here: https://northwestern.zoom.us/j/92512948058.

Agenda

  1. Get the project 2 files and dependencies installed on your computer.
  2. Practice using three of the modules that we have designed to help you with project 2 (located inside of the apis folder):
    • twilio
    • yelp
    • spotify
  3. Answer any questions you have.

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Review the Slides

No slides posted.
